docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $325.00 FILED BY GUILLEN, JUANA AS TO DEFENDANT GRANDE, OSCAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUILLEN, JUANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
